name: skills-of-luca
description: Reusable agent skills by Luca Silverentand.

plugins.name: apple-design
plugins.description: Apple Human Interface Guidelines as a single plugin: foundations, services, and a skill per Apple platform.

plugins.name: documentation
plugins.description: Documentation authoring and structured knowledge capture for design docs, ADRs, C4 diagrams, and decision trees.

plugins.name: frontend
plugins.description: Frontend design exploration toolkit for interactive HTML design options.

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Git workflow toolkit for commits, conflict resolution, rebases, and repository cleanup.

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: GitHub workflow toolkit for creating pull requests, monitoring CI, and getting PRs ready to merge.

plugins.name: linear-planner
plugins.description: Linear planning workflows for creating real project records from reusable planner structures without keeping template issues live.

plugins.name: project
plugins.description: Project setup and context management skills for requirements and shared agent context.

plugins.name: project-docs
plugins.description: Project document templates with one authoring skill for briefs, specs, designs, decisions, release checks, and reviews.

plugins.name: skill-creation
plugins.description: End-to-end toolkit for authoring, publishing, tooling, and improving reusable agent skills.

plugins.name: systems-design
plugins.description: Opinionated system design toolkit for architecture, data modeling, API design, workflow sequencing, and design review.
